What Makzora does

Everything your business needs to grow digitally

Six connected teams working as one partner, so nothing about your growth gets stuck between vendors.

Branding & graphic design

Logos, brand identity, social media posts, brochures, flyers, company profiles, and presentations.

Digital marketing

Social media management, ads, SEO, content planning, email marketing, and lead generation.

AI agents & automation

WhatsApp bots, customer support bots, sales follow-up agents, appointment booking, and CRM automation.

Software solutions

Business dashboards, CRM, booking systems, client portals, management software, and custom web apps.

Customer support services

Virtual CSR, live chat handling, email support, WhatsApp support, and client follow-up.

Makzora Academy

Training for Canva, graphic design, digital marketing, WordPress, AI tools, freelancing, and portfolios.

Solutions

Made for the way your business works

Select an industry to see how Makzora fits into your day to day.

Flow for retail

Product catalogs, promo posts, and a WhatsApp agent that answers stock questions and takes orders while you're on the floor.

Flow for clinics

Appointment booking agents, patient reminders, and a clean booking system that replaces the notebook at the front desk.

Flow for real estate

Listing pages, lead follow-up agents, and a CRM that tracks every inquiry from first message to signed deal.

Flow for restaurants

Menu design, social content, and a reservation and reply agent that handles bookings around the clock.

Flow for agencies

White-label dashboards, client portals, and automation kits you can resell under your own brand.

Why businesses choose Makzora

One place for design, marketing, AI, and software

Modern premium design style

Business-focused solutions

Affordable packages for startups and small businesses

Kits sized for where you are, not where a big agency wants you to be.

Training and support available

Automation-first approach
